description: Regroup w/ team (incl. Dave, Kirkland). Create new strategy/priorities for next several weeks. Prepare QBR-style recap. Share with HeyGen team within 1 week.
Follow up w/ API lead re: video creation API availability. Confirm timeline (est. 1-2 months). Check if early access possible for GrowthX team.
Find/create better method to showcase latest HeyGen features/roadmap for partners. If not found, compile info from news section.
